Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: aPPEARANCES:
alberto arambula, appellant, is present in court.
pearl e. kolling and cindy cisneros, respondents, are also present in court.

This cause comes on for trial de novo, having been assigned to the Honorable Judge Ronald Quidachay.

Appellant Alberto Arambula testifies on his own behalf and introduces the following documentary evidence:

1: Residential Tenancy Agreement
2: Package of correspondence

Respondents pearl e. kolling and cindy cisneros testify on their own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, NOT REPORTED, clerk: lesley fiscella (501).
